title: Verb Group 3: Movement & Life Management (21–35) — Word Blocks

exercises.prompt: Ask the teacher when the test is.
exercises.answer: Pergunta à professora quando é a prova.

exercises.prompt: Send me your address.
exercises.answer: Me manda o seu endereço.

exercises.prompt: He asked where the office is.
exercises.answer: Ele perguntou onde fica o escritório.

exercises.prompt: He always leaves after ten.
exercises.answer: Ele sempre sai depois das dez.

exercises.prompt: She works at night.
exercises.answer: Ela trabalha à noite.

exercises.prompt: She asked for more time.
exercises.answer: Ela pediu mais tempo.

exercises.prompt: We live far from downtown.
exercises.answer: Nós moramos longe do centro.

exercises.prompt: Close the refrigerator door.
exercises.answer: Feche a porta da geladeira.

exercises.prompt: Can you help me carry this box?
exercises.answer: Você pode me ajudar a carregar esta caixa?

exercises.prompt: She looked at the map carefully.
exercises.answer: Ela olhou o mapa com cuidado.

exercises.prompt: The pharmacy opens at eight.
exercises.answer: A farmácia abre às oito.

exercises.prompt: Can you bring me a glass of water?
exercises.answer: Você pode me trazer um copo de água?

exercises.prompt: Wait for me at the entrance.
exercises.answer: Me espera na entrada.

exercises.prompt: Turn on the fan, it's hot.
exercises.answer: Liga o ventilador, está quente.

exercises.prompt: Did you send the email?
exercises.answer: Você mandou o e-mail?

exercises.prompt: The mall closes at ten at night.
exercises.answer: O shopping fecha às dez da noite.

exercises.prompt: We hope to see you soon.
exercises.answer: Esperamos te ver em breve.

exercises.prompt: Look at that building over there!
exercises.answer: Olha aquele prédio ali!

exercises.prompt: I'll call you tomorrow morning.
exercises.answer: Vou te ligar amanhã de manhã.

exercises.prompt: I go out at night with my friends.
exercises.answer: Eu saio à noite com meus amigos.

exercises.prompt: Take this letter to the principal.
exercises.answer: Leve esta carta para a diretora.

exercises.prompt: Bring your planner to the meeting.
exercises.answer: Traga sua agenda para a reunião.

exercises.prompt: I always try to help my family.
exercises.answer: Eu sempre tento ajudar minha família.

exercises.prompt: She takes her son to the doctor.
exercises.answer: Ela leva o filho ao médico.

exercises.prompt: I work from Monday to Friday.
exercises.answer: Eu trabalho de segunda a sexta.

exercises.prompt: Can I order a coffee?
exercises.answer: Posso pedir um café?

exercises.prompt: She arrived at the airport early.
exercises.answer: Ela chegou no aeroporto cedo.

exercises.prompt: Can you open this jar for me?
exercises.answer: Você pode abrir este pote para mim?

exercises.prompt: What time does the train arrive?
exercises.answer: A que horas o trem chega?

exercises.prompt: Do you live in this neighborhood?
exercises.answer: Você mora neste bairro?
